title: ilex illustris
intro: Ilex illustris, also known as the American Holly, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of compounds such as alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Ilex illustris include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ilex illustris are typically made from its leaves and berries, which can be dried, ground into powder, or infused in hot water to make teas or decoctions.
